before: func ProcessOrder(ctx context.Context, req *OrderRequest) error { if req == nil { return ErrNull } if len(req.Items) == 0 { return ErrEmpty } customer, err := db.FindCustomer(ctx, req.CustomerID); if err != nil { return err } total := 0.0; for _, i := range req.Items { total += i.Price * float64(i.Qty) } order := &Order{Customer: customer, Total: total}; if err := db.SaveOrder(ctx, order); err != nil { return err }; notifier.Notify(ctx, order); return nil }
why_safe: Validation and total calculation extracted into helpers; ctx propagation, error values, and execution order preserved.
